Power Apps Incentive Program Suite

Incentive Bonus
Program Suite

A unified three-app system managing employee incentive bonus programs. Each app serves a distinct role — employee, supervisor, and admin — with tailored views, connected to the same ADP and Azure SQL backend.

ADP API Azure SQL Azure Functions Python Power Apps Canvas
01
Employee App · 15,000 Users

Employees track their own bonus progress, check eligibility conditions, and view payment history. Real-time ADP data, mobile-optimized.

Enrolled Bonuses
Bonus Detail
Supervisor App · 500 Users

Supervisors see their team's enrollment, eligibility, and payment progress. Supports approval workflows and exception handling.

Team Bonus Detail View
Admin App · Internal

Admins configure bonus packages, set eligibility rules, and trigger batch calculations via Azure Functions running Python — all from a single canvas app.

Analytics Dashboard
Bonus Package Profile

Innovation Hub
(InvHub)

End-to-end ideation and project management platform. Employees submit process improvement ideas, track multi-stage review approvals, and follow project lifecycle from backlog through delivery — with full integration across enterprise dev and collaboration tools.

Power Apps 17,000 Users

Mi Tiempo
y Ajustes

Mobile-first app enabling factory employees to view their time-sheet exceptions and submit corrections directly from the production floor. Single app with role-based routing — Employee, Supervisor, and Admin personas — reaching 17,000 users across multiple plants.

Azure SQL Power Apps Canvas Mobile Multi-Role Routing
03
Role Selection Screen
Key Features
  • → View attendance exceptions (late-in, missed punch, unexcused absence)
  • → Submit correction requests directly from mobile device
  • → Supervisor view for team-level exception management
  • → Admin panel for configuration and bulk operations

Power BI 21,000 Employees

Mexico Payroll
Dashboard

Comprehensive payroll reporting across all J&J Mexico manufacturing plants. Tracks time-sheet submissions, attendance exceptions, time-clock punch data per terminal, and exception trends by month and year — with Supervisor and organization-level drill-down views.

Power BI Project Management

JJPS Project
Summary (Ethicon)

Executive-level project portfolio dashboard for Ethicon / J&J Surgical Technologies. Displays active and inactive projects segmented by department, business unit, investment category, and project manager — with dynamic cross-filtering for leadership decision-making.

Power BI 1,000 Users

Innovation Hub
Analytics

Reporting layer for the InvHub platform. Tracks idea pipeline health — status distribution, approval rates, and rejection reasons — alongside project delivery metrics, 3E value and hours saved, and breakdowns by region and developer type. Surfaces the full ROI of J&J's citizen-developer program.
